CVE-2021-45829.title: HDF5 1.13.1-1 is affected by: segmentation fault, which causes a  ...
CVE-2021-45829.description: HDF5 1.13.1-1 is affected by: segmentation fault, which causes a Denial of Service.

CVE-2021-45830.title: A heap-based buffer overflow vulnerability exists in HDF5 1.13.1- ...
CVE-2021-45830.description: A heap-based buffer overflow vulnerability exists in HDF5 1.13.1-1 via H5F_addr_decode_len in /hdf5/src/H5Fint.c, which could cause a Denial of Service.

CVE-2021-45832.title: A Stack-based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability exists in HDF5 1.13.1 ...
CVE-2021-45832.description: A Stack-based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability exists in HDF5 1.13.1-1 at at hdf5/src/H5Eint.c, which causes a Denial of Service (context-dependent).

CVE-2021-45833.title: A Stack-based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability exists in HDF5 1.13.1 ...
CVE-2021-45833.description: A Stack-based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability exists in HDF5 1.13.1-1 via the H5D__create_chunk_file_map_hyper function in /hdf5/src/H5Dchunk.c, which causes a Denial of Service (context-dependent).

CVE-2021-46143.title: In doProlog in xmlparse.c in Expat (aka libexpat) before 2.4.3, a ...
CVE-2021-46143.description: In doProlog in xmlparse.c in Expat (aka libexpat) before 2.4.3, an integer overflow exists for m_groupSize.

CVE-2021-46242.title: HDF5 v1.13.1-1 was discovered to contain a heap-use-after free vi ...
CVE-2021-46242.description: HDF5 v1.13.1-1 was discovered to contain a heap-use-after free via the component H5AC_unpin_entry.

CVE-2021-46243.title: An untrusted pointer dereference vulnerability exists in HDF5 v1. ...
CVE-2021-46243.description: An untrusted pointer dereference vulnerability exists in HDF5 v1.13.1-1 via the function H5O__dtype_decode_helper () at hdf5/src/H5Odtype.c. This vulnerability can lead to a Denial of Service (DoS).

CVE-2021-46244.title: A Divide By Zero vulnerability exists in HDF5 v1.13.1-1 vis the f ...
CVE-2021-46244.description: A Divide By Zero vulnerability exists in HDF5 v1.13.1-1 vis the function H5T__complete_copy () at /hdf5/src/H5T.c. This vulnerability causes an aritmetic exception, leading to a Denial of Service (DoS).

CVE-2025-2153.title: A vulnerability, which was classified as critical, was found in H ...
CVE-2025-2153.description: A vulnerability, which was classified as critical, was found in HDF5 1.14.6. Affected is the function H5SM_delete of the file H5SM.c of the component h5 File Handler. The manipulation leads to heap-based buffer overflow. It is possible to launch the attack remotely. The complexity of an attack is rather high. The exploitability is told to be difficult. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used.
